display_text: Cost: 0 (Non-purchasable): Manacles of Power is a neutral item Tier 3. Its active ability tethers an enemy hero for up to 4 seconds, rooting them if they move beyond 300 units and granting the user bonus Strength. The bonus increases with each hero kill while active, enabling high risk/reward initiations. Stats: CD: 20s, Duration: 4s, Root Range: 300, Base Strength: +30.
